scripts.clean: node -e "try { const stdout = require('child_process').execSync('netstat -ano | findstr :3000').toString(); const lines = stdout.split('\n'); for (const line of lines) { const parts = line.trim().split(/\s+/); const pid = parts[parts.length - 1]; if (pid && parseInt(pid) > 0) { require('child_process').execSync('taskkill /F /PID ' + pid); } } } catch(e){} const fs = require('fs'); if (fs.existsSync('.next')) fs.rmSync('.next', { recursive: true, force: true });"
